description_long: This is a stylized, boxy minivan with a predominantly orange body and metallic gray lower panels, featuring a number '25' prominently displayed on the roof and front. The vehicle has a classic, angular design with a raised hood scoop, a visible exhaust pipe on the right side, and a cylindrical element on the roof, possibly representing a vent or siren. The windows are dark blue and rectangular, with the side windows being long and the front and rear windows slanted. The wheels are simple, with white hubcaps and black tires, and the minivan appears to have some surface wear and patchy textures, suggesting a rugged or well-used appearance. The front grille and headlights are stylized, and the rear is flat with minimal detailing. There are no visible sliding doors or roof racks, and the overall design is reminiscent of older American minivans or station wagons.
description: A boxy orange minivan with metallic gray panels, dark blue windows, and the number '25' on the roof, featuring stylized details and a rugged, worn look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the slanted windshield, raised hood scoop, number '25' on the roof, and a visible front grille.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the long side windows, metallic gray lower panels, and the cylindrical roof element.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the flat back, rear window, and the number '25' on the license plate area.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the exhaust pipe, side window configuration, and the overall boxy shape.
attribute_window_configuration: Two long rectangular side windows per side, one large slanted front windshield, and one rear window.
